content.en:
An Eternal Dao Body Perfection powerhouse like the Qinghe Dao Lord actually fell like this.

The eyes of the Eternal Dao Realm looking at Ye Tian all revealed a trace of fear and jealousy, in their opinion, Ye Tian's strength was already close to that of a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse.

This kind of strong person is not something they can offend, and it is only a strong person like Qin He who can suppress Ye Tian.

But once Ye Tian raised the Eternal Dao Body to the Consummation Realm, his strength was probably no less than that of Qin He and other powerhouses, and he would even be able to reach the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm soon.

......

As soon as the Qinghe Dao Master died, there was no excitement to see, and the other Eternal Dao realms scattered one after another.

And Ye Tian did not let go of the forces where the Qinghe Dao Lord was located, and wiped out some of the Eternal Dao Realms under his command.

He didn't want to keep those guys and get himself in trouble.

Regarding Ye Tian's behavior, the other lords naturally didn't care.

And since this incident, there has been no Eternal Dao Realm powerhouse to forcibly find Ye Tian to trade, and they have become very polite.

Even the order of the Endless Kingdom was much better, and those forces in the Endless Kingdom did not dare to disobey Ye Tian's orders, and they all became very obedient.

this day.

A top-notch Eternal Dao Realm proposed to trade the Eternal State Order with 25 Ye Tian, and the conditions he proposed attracted Ye Tian's attention.

this day.

Ye Tian met with this Eternal Dao Realm powerhouse, the Musical Note Dao Master, and discussed the transaction face-to-face.

"Note Dao Master, you said that you know the location of a floating realm, and there is an eternal realm beast in that floating realm, and there may be a treasure similar to the evil vine in the place it guards?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the note Dao Master nodded, "Of course, I'm not sure if there really is anything like the Evil Vine. However, the Eternal Beast really exists. The Eternal Realm Beast is a creature that has an eternal Dao seed from the innate, and it is full of treasures, refining its Eternal Dao Seed will help to improve its own Eternal Dao Seed, and it also has special materials on its body, which can help people comprehend the rules of the Eternal Sequence to the Dao, just an Eternal Realm Beast is very valuable. What's more, that floating world also contains a lot of resources. Therefore, the value of this floating realm is no less than that of the Eternal State Order. "

"Indeed, such a floating realm is no less valuable than the Eternal State Order, but if you sell this information to other Eternal Dao realms, won't I lose money?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

The Note Dao Lord assured: "Ye Tian Guo Lord, rest assured, I have absolutely not sold this information to other Eternal Dao Realms, I can make an oath." And, once we make a deal, I won't be exploring that floating realm again, and whatever you get from there, I won't ask. "

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and continued to ask, "How long will it be before that floating realm borders the Eternal Realm. "

The Floating Realm is a world that is constantly floating around the Eternal Realm, and the Ancient Abyss Realm of the Void is a Floating Realm, which occasionally collides with the Void Realm.

The floating world is big and small, and the value is also different, the ordinary floating world naturally has no value, but this time the floating world provided by the music note Dao master is naturally different.

"There are still 300 million years to go!"

The note Dao Master said.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian signed an agreement with the Note Dao Master, and the Note Dao Master made an oath.

Then, the Note Dao Lord informed the location of the floating realm, and Ye Tian also gave the Eternal State Decree to the Note Dao Master.

Of course.

It is not impossible for the Note Dao Master to risk the oath to punish him for deceiving him, but if he dares to do so, he will naturally not let go of the Music Note Dao Master.

Next.

Ye Tian only needed to wait for the 300 million Dao Era years before he would enter that floating realm and take a look.

The Musical Note Dao Master didn't have the strength to explore the floating realm, but Ye Tian had this strength.

......

Not long after, the Musical Note Dao Lord relied on the Eternal National Decree given by Ye Tian and successfully opened up an Eternal Kingdom.

This eternal kingdom was named the Musical Note Nation, and the Musical Note Nation became a Lord.

And Ye Tian and the Lord of the Musical Note Country also said that once the 100 million years of the Musical Note Country have passed, they will give a piece of the area to the use of the development forces of the human race.

The years passed.

Gradually, 100 million solstice years passed.

this day.

Many forces have settled in the country of notes, and the Terrans have also sent some forces to settle in it, successfully gaining a foothold in the country of notes.

"There are still 20,000 years to go, and that floating realm will appear!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And during this period of time, there are more and more Eternal Dao Realms of the human race, but the birth of the Eternal Dao Realm is slow, after all, without the support of his resources, and the benefits of the Endless Realm are gone, it is not so easy to give birth to resources later.

Therefore, it is naturally difficult for them to become the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm.

However, there are already a lot of Eternal Dao realms of the human race, and even if the increase is very slow in the future, many Eternal Dao realms can be born one after another over a long period of time.

For human beings, what is currently lacking is a strong person who has cultivated the Eternal Dao Species, and no matter how many ordinary Eternal Dao Realms are born, it will not be of much help to human beings.

In the following days, Ye Tian mainly looked for various resources to feed the Tree Heart Demon Seed and the Evil Vine, consuming endless energy to strengthen his Eternal Dao Seed and Eternal Dao Body.

His eternal Dao body is also gradually approaching the state of perfection.

He estimated that it would not be too long before he could ascend to the consummation realm by touching his eternal Dao body.

Gradually, another 200 million solstical Dao era years passed, and his eternal Dao body finally broke through to the consummation realm.

And at this time, the floating world finally appeared.

......

Somewhere in the death zone.

A copy of Ye Tian's body came here, he determined the location, and sensed that an Eternal Boundary Barrier had become extremely weak, and then he easily tore through the Eternal Boundary Barrier.

Swish!

He shuttled to a floating realm.

"Come in, there's really a floating realm!"

He continued to delve deeper into the floating realm to see if the Lord of the Music Note Nation had exaggerated.

Rumble!!!!!

An incomparably terrifying dragon-shaped giant beast appeared, exuding the aura of the Eternal Dao Seed all over its body, but it didn't have much wisdom, and it wasn't a demon seed.

"Sure enough, it's an Eternal Beast!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

Through his ability to copy, he learned the identity of this Eternal Beast.

【Taixuan Realm Dragon】

And in the depths of this floating realm, Ye Tian also sensed wisps of special aura, a bit like a demon seed, but not very similar, it was indeed similar to an evil vine, but what it was was still uncertain.

"It seems that the Lord of the Musical Note Country has not deceived me, but I still have to kill this Taixuan Realm Dragon first!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
